title: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song
posterAlt: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The battle rages on as Shirou continues to protect Sakura, now consumed by the darkness. He joins forces with Rin to end the Holy Grail War, while Illyasviel, who knows the truth behind it, confronts her fate. Amidst the chaos, Zouken plots to manipulate Sakura for his own desires. The final fight begins.
synopsis: Fate/stay night: Heaven's Feel III. Spring Song (2020) is a animation, romance and fantasy film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
